title: Telnyx PyPI Package With 742,000 downloads Compromised in TeamPCP Supply Chain A

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 - Telnyx PyPI Package With 742,000 downloads Compromised in Te
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/04/01
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*hangup.wav*'
            - '*ringtone.wav*'
            - '*sys.executable*'
            - '*tpcp.tar.gz*'
            - '*w.getnframes*'
            - '*w.readframes*'
            - '*wave.open*'
    condition: selection_dns
level: high
rules.yara:
rule CDB_APEX_Telnyx_PyPI_Package_With_742_000_downloa {
    meta:
        description = "Telnyx PyPI Package With 742,000 downloads Compromised in Te"
        author = "CyberDudeBivash"
    strings:
        $h0 = "7321caa303fe96ded0492c747d2f353c4f7d17185656fe292ab0a59e2bd0b8d9" ascii nocase
        $h1 = "cd08115806662469bbedec4b03f8427b97c8a4b3bc1442dc18b72b4e19395fe3" ascii nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}
